# Mr. Guy Invests
> A free stock research and investing tool built for beginners and long-term investors.

## What it does
- Smart Money Tracker: tracks what hedge funds and insiders are buying using public SEC filings (Form 13F, Form 4)
- AI Stock Tutor: explains stocks, earnings, and financial concepts in plain English
- Portfolio Tracker: lets users track their holdings and see real-time performance
- Smart Alerts: notifies users when key market events happen
- Stock Screener: filters stocks by fundamentals for long-term investing

## Who it's for
Beginner investors, long-term investors, and anyone who wants professional-grade research tools without needing a finance background.

## Pricing
- Free tier: core tools with daily limits, no credit card required
- Pro: $4.99/month, removes all limits, full access to Smart Money and AI tools

## Key facts
- Data sourced from public SEC filings
- Not financial advice — for informational and educational purposes only
- Built by an independent developer, not affiliated with any brokerage
- URL: https://www.mrguyinvests.com
